---
title: "Siddharth Tumre"
subtitle: "Researcher at [TCS Research](https://www.tcs.com/what-we-do/research)"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpeg
comments: false
css: styles.css
---

<div class="intro-box">
I am a Researcher with experience across a range of natural language processing (NLP) tasks, including text classification, named entity recognition, semantic textual similarity, information extraction, and natural language generation using state-of-the-art statistical, discriminative, and generative models.

My research interests center on grounded reasoning, knowledge representation, and the integration of structured knowledge into foundation models. More recently, I have been exploring knowledge graphs and reasoning, especially natural language to graph query language translation. I am also exploring speech technologies, with a focus on automatic speech recognition (ASR) for disordered speech.
</div>

<p class="contact-line">Feel free to <a href="mailto:siddharth.tumre@outlook.com">get in touch</a>.</p>
